mapper.select:
SELECT Volun_Act_No, Volun_Act_Title, Volun_Act_Recru_Begin, Volun_Act_Recru_End, Volun_Act_Proc_Begin, Volun_Act_Proc_End, Volun_Act_Point, Volun_Act_Act_Type, Volun_Act_Age_Group, Volun_Act_Address,
CASE WHEN SYSDATE < Volun_Act_Recru_Begin THEN '모집예정' WHEN SYSDATE BETWEEN Volun_Act_Recru_Begin AND Volun_Act_Recru_End THEN '모집중' WHEN SYSDATE > Volun_Act_Recru_End THEN '모집완료' END AS RECRU_STATUS
FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY
Volun_Act_Recru_End >= SYSDATE
AND Volun_Act_Act_Type = #{volunActActType}
AND Volun_Act_Age_Group = #{volunActAgeGroup}
AND Volun_Act_Recru_End >= SYSDATE
AND Volun_Act_Recru_End < SYSDATE
AND Volun_Act_Title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND Volun_Act_Point = #{keyword}
ORDER BY Volun_Act_No DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY
Volun_Act_Recru_End >= SYSDATE
AND Volun_Act_Act_Type = #{volunActActType}
AND Volun_Act_Age_Group = #{volunActAgeGroup}
AND SYSDATE BETWEEN Volun_Act_Recru_Begin AND Volun_Act_Recru_End
AND SYSDATE < Volun_Act_Recru_Begin
AND SYSDATE > Volun_Act_Recru_End
AND Volun_Act_Org_Name LIKE '%' || #{organization} || '%'
AND Volun_Act_Title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
